# Simple Fixture

> A tiny fake project used to exercise repoblender. It has a README, some source, and a config file.

## Root

- [.gitignore](.gitignore): *.log
- [README.md](README.md): A tiny fake project used to exercise repoblender. It has a README, some source, and a config file.
- [config.yaml](config.yaml): Fixture server configuration.

## src

- [src/helper.py](src/helper.py): Helper module for the simple fixture.
- [src/main.go](src/main.go): Package main is the entry point for the simple fixture.

## Full File Contents

### .gitignore

```
*.log
build/
```

### README.md

```markdown
# Simple Fixture

A tiny fake project used to exercise repoblender.
It has a README, some source, and a config file.

## Usage

Nothing to run — this is only test data.
```

### config.yaml

```yaml
# Fixture server configuration.
port: 8080
host: localhost
```

### src/helper.py

```python
"""Helper module for the simple fixture."""


def greet(name: str) -> str:
    return f"hello {name}"
```

### src/main.go

```go
// Package main is the entry point for the simple fixture.
package main

func main() {}
```
